questions.question: Pink Floyd released this groundbreaking album in 1973.
questions.answer: The Dark Side of the Moon

questions.question: Elena Verdugo plays a loving nurse and office manager in what television medical drama?
What legendary entertainer was buried with $1,008 so he'd always have enough money to play cards?

This singer-songwriter made a big splash in the '70s with songs including "You Can Leave Your Hat On" and "Short People."
